problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
